title: DeepMind workers force military AI into formal mediation - TCR 05/21/26
description:
Google DeepMind's UK workforce moved a dispute over military and defense AI work into formal Acas mediation, Eli Lilly's triple-agonist retatrutide posted 28.3% average weight loss in Phase 3 trials, and a LeRobot humanoid arm folded laundry and poured drinks using Python motion policies Claude wrote in conversation against the new CaP-X benchmark.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-may-21-2026/

0:00 Claude writes robot motion code on CaP-X benchmark
1:44 DeepMind UK workers enter Acas mediation over military AI
5:36 Eli Lilly retatrutide hits 28.3% weight loss in Phase 3
9:18 Claude Writes the Motion, and the Arm Moves
12:35 1Password MCP server and Microsoft Rampart and Clarity ship together
16:26 Close

This episode covers the DeepMind UK Acas mediation over military AI work and what it means for governance built through labor frameworks, Lilly's retatrutide Phase 3 readout and the trajectory from semaglutide through tirzepatide to triple-agonist molecules, code-as-policy robotics inverting the demonstration-data approach to embodied AI, the 1Password and OpenAI MCP server for just-in-time agent credentials, Microsoft's open-source Rampart and Clarity red-team agents, US grid storage hitting 9.7 GWh in Q1 with the 2030 forecast revised to 610 GWh, and Boston Metal's $75M round extending molten oxide electrolysis into critical metals refining.

The DeepMind story is the day's defining AI friction beat: frontier-lab researchers using Acas, the UK's statutory conciliation service set up in 1975, to contest the gap between their lab's founding scientific-openness charter and its current military contracts. The mediation route gives the dispute legal standing and adds to a record future tribunals can cite. Retatrutide's 28.3% Phase 3 readout extends a category that did not exist as a therapeutic option a decade ago, with downstream implications running through cardiovascular trials, insurance, food formulation, and metabolic surgery. The code-as-policy demonstration moves the bottleneck in home robotics from substrate to planning layer, with Claude generating step-by-step motion code that a low-cost arm executes and revises on failure. The 1Password MCP server and Microsoft's Rampart and Clarity release together show governance infrastructure shipping inside the agent protocol on the same clock as agentic capability, closing the verification gap that surfaced with the April PocketOS database deletion. SEIA's Q1 storage figure compounds faster than the previous forecast curve with 71% of new capacity sited in Republican-voting states, and Boston Metal's pivot from green steel into rare earths signals critical metals refining electrifying at the chemistry layer rather than relocating at the geography layer.
